$comment: Backfilled at launch. Counters in the homepage range (140s filings, 4–5K pages, 6–8 audio hours). model_flags and promoted_to_desk are plausible placeholders the principal can edit; do not treat as principal-reviewed.

model_flags.summary: Mainline tolling commentary in the Q1 prepared remarks emphasized contract structure ahead of the 2027 settlement. Length and posture differ from the trailing four-call mean.
Streaming portfolio commentary shifted from hedged to directional language on long-dated silver and gold realizations. Worth a re-read against the prior call.

promoted_to_desk.reason: AECO basis commentary continues to set the Canadian gas baseline. Adds Tourmaline to the working note ahead of the next coverage refresh.
Royalty-portfolio rebalancing commentary suggests a structural shift toward the iron-ore stream — flagged for a deeper read at the quarterly review.
